channel.title: Full-Stack on Danish Web
channel.description: Recent content in Full-Stack on Danish Web

item.title: Gethub
item.description: Freelancer and project-owner platform built for the Bangkit capstone.

item.title: What I Learned from Gethub
item.description: Lessons from building a freelancer platform across product, mobile, and feature integration.

item.title: The Stack I Use for Web, Mobile, and DevOps
item.description: A summary of the technologies I use to build clean and maintainable products.
